heading.purpose: App-bar view title and panel headers. Largest type in the system (18px ceiling).

body.purpose: All prose — note bodies, descriptions. Inter, 14px, measure 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase mono metadata — weekday headers, scope lines, in-panel section eyebrows.

mono.purpose: Every number: day numbers, times, week numbers, dates, counts.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Fully-flat doctrine: depth is borders + tonal surfaces, never box-shadow. Existing shadow-xl overlays are a debt to reconcile.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and panel slides.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary action per screen — New event, quick-create Add.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2e4756; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2e4756; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action — Today, dialog cancel.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #4a4a4a; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #d6d2c7; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f4f1ea; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Title/text field. Focus shifts the border to Deep Teal — no glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #fafaf8; color: #1a1a1a; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #d6d2c7; border-radius: 4px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.1s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #76736c; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2e4756; }

components.name: Note Card
components.description: Authored note in the notes panel — flat, border-defined, 5px corners.
components.css: .ds-note-card { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: left; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ece9e2; border-radius: 5px; padding: 14px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.1s ease; } .ds-note-card:hover { border-color: #d6d2c7; } .ds-note-date { display: block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #76736c; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-note-title { display: block; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-note-body { display: block; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.6; color: #4a4a4a; }

components.name: View Switch
components.description: Segmented D/W/M/Y control; active segment is the one teal fill.
components.css: .ds-switch { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid #d6d2c7; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-switch button { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 6px 12px; min-width: 34px; text-align: center; background: #fff; color: #4a4a4a; border: none; border-right: 1px solid #ece9e2; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s ease; } .ds-switch button:last-child { border-right: none; } .ds-switch button:hover { background: #f4f1ea; } .ds-switch .ds-active { background: #2e4756; color: #fff; }

components.name: Event Chip (timed)
components.description: Timed event in week/day grid. 2px left border = calendar identity (the one sanctioned side-stripe).
components.css: .ds-chip { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; width: 100%; text-align: left; background: transparent; border: none; border-left: 2px solid #2e4756; padding: 2px 6px 2px 7px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.1s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #f4f1ea; } .ds-chip-time { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #76736c; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chip-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.3; color: #1a1a1a; }

components.name: Today Marker
components.description: The day number for today: an amber ring, never a fill. The one warm accent.
components.css: .ds-today { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 22px; height: 22px; border: 2px solid #b68843; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; }

narrative.overview: The calm workspace of a senior editor, rendered as software. The page recedes; content — hours, events, written notes — is the only thing asked to speak. Type carries the personality and chrome stays quiet: humanist sans for prose, monospace for every number and metadatum. The system answers to one thesis: time and thinking belong on one surface, so a notes panel must feel as native as the grid beside it. It beats Apple on calm and Google on warmth with less, not more: muted calendar hues, one deep-teal accent used sparingly, warm-neutral surfaces that read as paper-adjacent without being cream.
keyCharacteristics: Negative space first; compact density without crowding.
Monospace for all numbers and metadata; humanist sans for body.
One deep-teal accent, used rarely. Calendar colors muted, never saturated.
Fully flat — depth comes from borders and tonal surfaces, never drop shadows.
Keyboard-first: every interaction has a visible, calm focus path.
Motion is intentional and quiet, or absent.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Deep Teal appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity makes the active view or primary action legible at a glance. Never tint chrome teal to look designed.

rules.name: The No-Saturation Rule
rules.body: Calendar colors are muted by construction. If a hue looks vivid next to the surface, desaturate it toward the palette.

rules.name: The Mono-Metadata Rule
rules.body: Every number and metadatum is monospace; prose is sans. This single split carries most of the system's personality.

rules.name: The Calm Ceiling Rule
rules.body: The largest type is 18px. No display scale, no hero clamp. A heading that wants to be bigger gets more space, not more size.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are forbidden as a depth device. Separate planes with a border and a surface step, not box-shadow. Overlays included.

rules.name: The Border-Defines-Structure Rule
rules.body: Hairline borders (≤1px, from the border ramp) do the structural work shadows would. Never thicken a border into a card stripe.

dos: Do set every number and metadatum in JetBrains Mono; prose in Inter.
Do keep Deep Teal to ≤10% of any screen; let negative space and type do the work.
Do convey depth with borders + tonal surfaces (Warm Paper -> Surface -> Soft Surface).
Do keep radii small: 3-8px for cards/inputs/buttons; rounded-full only for pills, the today ring, and the avatar.
Do give every interaction a keyboard path with a visible 2px Deep Teal focus ring.
Do write empty states, never stock them.
Do keep the largest type at 18px; add space, not size.
donts: Don't use drop shadows as a depth device — the system is fully flat.
Don't saturate calendar colors; muted by construction.
Don't lighten text-3 (#76736c) for elegance — it's tuned to clear AA on Warm Paper.
Don't translate warm/editorial into a cream/parchment/sand body background.
Don't use a side-stripe border >1px as decoration; the 2px timed-event-chip border is the single functional exception.
Don't import the anti-references: Google's cold density, productivity-bro streaks/XP/nudges, AI-summarizer dashboards, or the SaaS-AI-landing kit.
Don't animate for applause; quiet and intentional with a reduced-motion fallback, or absent.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, or numbered/eyebrow section scaffolding.
